objective: Fix missing context_orchestrator runtime configuration gaps and add global Codex guidance for planner/indexing/semantic search usage.
edits: Updated src/services/index-service.ts to preserve MCP env in inventory entries, generate UUID-compatible deterministic point ids, and ignore legacy cached point ids.
Updated tests/index-service.test.ts with env-preservation and UUID point-id regression coverage.

Updated C:\Users\Gabi\.codex\AGENTS.md with a Context Orchestrator Usage section covering prepare_task_context, plan_or_review, search tools, status checks, reindexing, probing, and durable memory use.
Added temporary verification helpers tmp/test-mcp-servers.mjs, tmp/probe-context-orchestrator.mjs, and tmp/debug-bootstrap.mjs.

verification.fresh_probe: pass: spawned context_orchestrator reports planner=true embeddings=true and no bootstrap warning in stderr

outcome.runtime: Fixed the real missing-config/runtime path: stdio probes now forward configured MCP env, so spawned context_orchestrator children inherit planner and embedding settings from Codex config.
outcome.semantic_indexing: Fixed two semantic bootstrap bugs: Gemini embedContent now uses outputDimensionality and Qdrant upserts now use UUID-compatible deterministic point ids even when legacy cache entries exist.
outcome.documentation: Global Codex instructions now explicitly describe when and how to use prepare_task_context, plan_or_review, semantic search, reindexing, and MCP probing tools.
